name: aiad
description: On-demand augmentation skills for human-first development: the human is the engine that writes the code and the AI augments it when invoked (ia-in-the-loop). Covers design advice and option exploration, rubber duck, didactic code review and refactor/perf, test generation (TDD, unit, e2e), pairing, unblocking when you are stuck, an authorship journal, and the user-story <-> OpenSpec change bridge to switch between AIAD and SDD. Complements AIDD/SDD without modifying them.
